ValidationRule.description: Order shipping country must be France, Belgium, Switzerland or Luxembourg.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(ShippingCountry)), NOT( OR( ShippingCountry = "France", ShippingCountry = "Belgium", ShippingCountry = "Switzerland", ShippingCountry = "Luxembourg" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Shipping country must be France, Belgium, Switzerland or Luxembourg
